testcase.name: Community Page › page loads with heading
Community Page › posts are displayed (demo data fallback)
Community Page › sort tabs are visible
Community Page › post cards show text content
Community Page › clicking a post (via title) navigates to post detail page
Community Page › login prompt is visible for unauthenticated users
Community Page › channel filter query param does not break the page
Post Detail Page › demo post 'post-1' loads with title and article content
Post Detail Page › demo fallback post ID '1' also resolves
Post Detail Page › breadcrumb links back to community list
Post Detail Page › comments section is present
Get Started Overview Page › page loads with heading and step links
Get Started Overview Page › displays all 8 step links (each link appears in sidebar AND main content)
Get Started Overview Page › before/after comparison cards are visible
Get Started Overview Page › phase labels (Setup, Activate, etc.) are visible
Get Started Overview Page › clicking Step 0 card (in main content) navigates to step detail page
Get Started Overview Page › clicking Step 3 card navigates correctly
Step Detail Pages › Step 0 loads with all required sections
Step Detail Pages › Step 0 progress shows 'Step 1 of 8' and '13%'
Step Detail Pages › Step 7 progress shows 'Step 8 of 8' and '100%'
Step Detail Pages › step detail has a tasks list with numbered items
Step Detail Pages › navigation to next step works (Step 0 -> Step 1)
Step Detail Pages › last step (Step 7) has no Next link — shows Explore Skills instead
Step Detail Pages › first step (Step 0) has no Previous link — shows Overview instead
Step Detail Pages › invalid step number shows 404
Step Detail Pages › Step 0 page is accessible
Step Detail Pages › Step 1 page is accessible
Step Detail Pages › Step 2 page is accessible
Step Detail Pages › Step 3 page is accessible
Step Detail Pages › Step 4 page is accessible
Step Detail Pages › Step 5 page is accessible
Step Detail Pages › Step 6 page is accessible
Step Detail Pages › Step 7 page is accessible
Homepage › hero section loads with title and CTA buttons
Homepage › navigation bar renders all main links
Homepage › clicking nav logo returns to homepage
Homepage › nav Skills link navigates to /en/skills
Homepage › nav Community link navigates to /en/community
Homepage › nav Get Started link navigates to /en/get-started
Homepage › dark mode toggle is clickable without errors
Homepage › language switcher is visible in nav
Homepage › quick start section is present with code block
Homepage › skills library section shows category cards
Homepage › no console errors on page load
Marketplace Page › page loads with heading
Marketplace Page › listings are displayed (DB or demo fallback)
Marketplace Page › listing cards show skill name, price, and description
Marketplace Page › clicking first listing navigates to detail page
Marketplace Page › list skill button is present
Marketplace Detail Page › detail page loads for the first listing in the list
Marketplace Detail Page › detail page shows description section
Marketplace Detail Page › buy button is present and disabled (no wallet connected)
Marketplace Detail Page › breadcrumb returns to marketplace list
Search Dialog › Cmd+K opens the search dialog
Search Dialog › search dialog has a text input with placeholder
Search Dialog › hint text shown when fewer than 2 characters typed
Search Dialog › hint text hides when 2+ characters typed
Search Dialog › Escape key closes the dialog
Search Dialog › clicking the backdrop closes the dialog
Search Dialog › search button in nav opens dialog
Search Dialog › typing a query sends request to /api/search
Search Dialog › dialog shows 'No results found' when API returns empty
Search Dialog › dialog shows results when API returns data
Search Dialog › reopening dialog clears previous query
Skills Page › page loads with heading and skill cards
Skills Page › search input filters visible skill cards
Skills Page › search with no match shows empty state
Skills Page › clearing search restores all skills
Skills Page › skill cards display name and description
Skills Page › clicking a skill card navigates to detail page
Skills Page › skills page URL is correct
Skill Detail Page › renders skill title and metadata for academic-search
Skill Detail Page › skill detail page has Install section
Skill Detail Page › unknown skill slug shows 404 page
